query_normalized: autocorrelation of the möbius function in short intervals mathematics
rationale: The paper studies correlations of the Möbius (and Liouville) function, proving a special case of the Chowla conjecture and invoking results on short‑interval behavior (Matomäki‑Radziwiłł‑Tao). This directly concerns the autocorrelation mechanism of the Möbius function, satisfying criterion (a) (same‑mechanism evidence).
